member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexType
member.summary: Type of vector indexing to use. Default is None.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexFile
member.summary: When vector indexing is enabled, the name of the file used to hold the index.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexThreshold
member.summary: When vector indexing is enabled, the number of vectors required to use the index. Brute force computation is often faster than use of an index for smaller batches of vectors. Default is null. When set, the minimum value is 1.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorDimensionality
member.summary: When vector indexing is enabled, the dimensionality of vectors that will be stored in this graph. Default is null. When set, the minimum value is 1.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexM
member.summary: HNSW M parameter - number of bi-directional links created for each new element during construction. Higher values lead to better recall but higher memory consumption and slower insertion. Default is 16. Valid range is 2-100.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexEf
member.summary: HNSW Ef parameter - size of the dynamic list used during k-NN search. Higher values lead to better recall but slower search. Default is 50. Valid range is k to 10000, where k is the number of nearest neighbors requested.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexEfConstruction
member.summary: HNSW EfConstruction parameter - size of the dynamic list used during index construction. Higher values lead to better index quality but slower construction. Default is 200. Valid range is 1 to 10000.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexDirty
member.summary: Indicates that the configured vector index may be inconsistent with persisted vectors and should be rebuilt.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexDirtyUtc
member.summary: Timestamp when the vector index was marked dirty.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.VectorIndexDirtyReason
member.summary: Reason the vector index was marked dirty.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.Graph.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from last update, in UTC.

member.summary: Maximum rows to return when the query omits LIMIT.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.GraphQueryRequest.IncludeProfile

member.summary: Get statistics for a subgraph starting from a specific node, traversing up to a specified depth. This method performs lightweight traversal and returns complete statistics.
member.param: Maximum depth to traverse (0 = only the starting node, 1 = immediate neighbors, etc.).
Maximum number of nodes to retrieve (0 = unlimited).
Maximum number of edges to retrieve (0 = unlimited).
member.returns: GraphStatistics with node/edge counts and label/tag/vector counts.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorIndexType
member.summary: Type of vector indexing to use.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorIndexFile
member.summary: When vector indexing is enabled, the name of the file used to hold the index. Required for SQLite-based indices.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorIndexThreshold
member.summary: When vector indexing is enabled, the number of vectors required to use the index. Brute force computation is often faster than use of an index for smaller batches of vectors. Default is null. When set, the minimum value is 1.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorDimensionality
member.summary: When vector indexing is enabled, the dimensionality of vectors that will be stored in this graph. Required for vector indexing. When set, the minimum value is 1.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorIndexM
member.summary: HNSW M parameter - number of bi-directional links created for each new element during construction. Higher values lead to better recall but higher memory consumption and slower insertion. Default is 16. Valid range is 2-100.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorIndexEf
member.summary: HNSW Ef parameter - size of the dynamic list used during k-NN search. Higher values lead to better recall but slower search. Default is 50. Valid range is 1 to 10000.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.VectorIndexEfConstruction
member.summary: HNSW EfConstruction parameter - size of the dynamic list used during index construction. Higher values lead to better index quality but slower construction. Default is 200. Valid range is 1 to 10000.

member.name: M:LiteGraph.VectorIndexConfiguration.#ctor(LiteGraph.Graph)
member.summary: Instantiate the object from a Graph.

member.summary: Apply this configuration to a Graph object.

member.summary: Create a configuration for disabling vector indexing.

member.summary: Result from a vector search operation containing the identifier and a similarity score.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorScoreResult.Score
member.summary: Similarity score. The interpretation depends on the search type used.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorSearchRequest.TopK
member.summary: Specify the top K number of results to return. Default is 100. Value can be null, but if not null, must be greater than zero.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorSearchRequest.MinimumScore
member.summary: Minimum score. Default value is 0. Value must be null, or, zero or greater.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorSearchRequest.MaximumDistance
member.summary: Maximum distance. Default value is the maximum float value. Value must be null, or, greater than zero.

member.name: P:LiteGraph.VectorSearchRequest.MinimumInnerProduct
member.summary: Minimum inner product. Default value is 0. Value must be null, or, zero or greater.

member.name: F:LiteGraph.VectorSearchTypeEnum.CosineDistance
member.summary: Cosine distance, the inverse of cosine similarity.

member.name: F:LiteGraph.VectorSearchTypeEnum.CosineSimilarity
member.summary: Cosine similarity, the inverse of cosine distance.

member.name: F:LiteGraph.VectorSearchTypeEnum.EuclidianDistance
member.summary: Euclidian distance, also known as L2 distance, the inverse of Euclidian similarity or L2 similarity.

member.name: F:LiteGraph.VectorSearchTypeEnum.EuclidianSimilarity
member.summary: Euclidian simmilarity, also known as L2 similarity, the inverse of Euclidian distance or L2 distance.

member.name: F:LiteGraph.VectorSearchTypeEnum.DotProduct
member.summary: Dot product similarity. Equivalent to cosine similarity when vectors are normalized, that is, magnitudes are all 1.
